title: Magicfyy
subtitle: MVP
description: Magicfyy - an interactive hub for Magic: The Gathering players, built around the Scryfall public API for card search and the “Guess the Card” mini-game. A solo-developed, crafted from scratch, from UI design to data logic. It blends functionality, utility, and fun into a single, lightweight interface.

title: Stream Solutions
subtitle: DEMO
description: Stream Solutions - A demo/preview of a conceptual media house website. Developed as a front-end implementation in close collaboration with a UX/UI designer, the project presents the proposed visual direction, layout, and interaction structure. This version serves as an early-stage concept rather than a finished commercial product.
